message:
polish(viz): IntakePhasesViz round 2/3 — motion + visual hierarchy

- Spring physics: transition upgraded from duration-based easeOut to
  spring (stiffness: 280, damping: 28) for natural drill panel swaps
- Progress indicator: 9-segment bar in the narrative-sync panel shows
  which phase is active, with sky-400 accent and trailing fill
- Opening question: upgraded to base font size, italic, with proper
  quotation marks — the pedagogical centerpiece gets visual weight
- Narrative sync copy: tightened from verbose sentences to concise cues

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
